creator: r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/rubygem-net-ssh,
>
> Please note that PR ports/133529 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
>   
Thanks! I have inspected the patch and it looks good to me.

Unfortunately I no longer have an active FreeBSD installation to test 
this on, so if anyone is interested in taking over maintainership then I 
will gladly hand it over.

Kind regards,

Roderick
